message:
refactor(codegen): Consolidate mutation tracking to passes system

Wire the passes system as the single source of truth for variable
mutation, aug_assign, and unused detection. Key changes:

- Add FunctionScope struct for per-function tracking (mutations,
  aug_assigns, uses, mutates_self)
- Add function_scopes field to AnalysisResult with query methods
- Add Pass 7 to analyze each function's internal scope
- Wire core.zig to use passes system as primary source
- Keep legacy func_local_* as fallback during transition
- Fix test module discovery to allow test.test_* utilities
- Add test_test_importlib_util alias to runtime

Test results: 27.7% pass rate (18/65) - no regressions.
No "never mutated" errors.
